name: KS
text: When we wanted to look for an investment property, we contacted Pooja for help. Immediately after that Pooja set up showings in neighborhoods that not only offer high probability of finding renters but also have homes that are reasonably priced for an investment property. She also screened several homes for their layout and quality and handpicked those that met our requirements. We were able to quickly converge from multitude of options including new vs older home, price range and down payment requirements to selecting the final home that we ended up purchasing. Pooja was also very helpful through the loan closure steps by getting us prescreened for a loan and working with a provider to get us the best possible mortgage rates. When we needed help with inspection of the house, she helped set that up and when we found some issues that needed attention, she helped manage the communication with the seller and negotiated a better closing price for us. Pooja made the entire process of buying a home effortless and we were lucky to find a realtor who works tirelessly to make the purchasing process efficient.
